content.query:
CREATE VIEW     BI_ItemMaster
-- drop view BI_ItemMaster
-- select * from BI_ItemMaster where [Item Number] = 'JD-1'
as

SELECT          X.*, COALESCE(Y.Description, X.Description) AS [Aligned Item Description]
FROM
(
SELECT          FW.[Item Number]
, COALESCE(A.[Salsify Item Number], B.[Salsify Item Number]) as [Salsify Item Number]
, COALESCE(A.[Description], B.[Description]) as [Description]
, COALESCE(A.[Transition From], B.[Transition From]) as [Transition From]
, COALESCE(A.[Transition To], B.[Transition To]) as [Transition To]
, COALESCE(A.[Aligned Item Number], B.[Aligned Item Number]) as [Aligned Item Number]
, COALESCE(A.[Status], B.[Status]) as [Status]
, COALESCE(A.[Manufactured or Purchased], B.[Manufactured or Purchased]) as [Manufactured or Purchased]
, COALESCE(A.[Item Type], B.[Item Type]) as [Item Type]
, COALESCE(A.[Business Unit], B.[Business Unit]) as [Business Unit]
, COALESCE(A.[Division], B.[Division]) as [Division]
, COALESCE(A.[Finance Brand], B.[Finance Brand]) as [Finance Brand]
, COALESCE(A.[Brand], B.[Brand]) as [Brand]
, COALESCE(A.[Sub-Brand], B.[Sub-Brand]) as [Sub-Brand]
, COALESCE(A.[Brand Control], B.[Brand Control]) as [Brand Control]
, COALESCE(A.[Collection], B.[Collection]) as [Collection]
, COALESCE(A.[Product Line], B.[Product Line]) as [Product Line]
, COALESCE(A.[Category], B.[Category]) as [Category]
, COALESCE(A.[Subcategory], B.[Subcategory]) as [Subcategory]
, COALESCE(A.[Base Model SKU], B.[Base Model SKU]) as [Base Model SKU]
, COALESCE(A.[FOB Cost], B.[FOB Cost]) as [FOB Cost]
, A.[M3 Cost] as [M3 Cost]
, A.[WIP Number] as [WIP Number]
, COALESCE(A.[Freight Cost], B.[Freight Cost]) as [Freight Cost]
, COALESCE(A.[Landed Cost], B.[Landed Cost]) as [Landed Cost]
, COALESCE(A.[Wholesale Price], B.[Wholesale Price]) as [Wholesale Price]
, COALESCE(A.[US Duty Rate], B.[US Duty Rate]) as [US Duty Rate]
, COALESCE(A.[CA Duty Rate], B.[CA Duty Rate]) as [CA Duty Rate]
, COALESCE(A.[Weight], B.[Weight]) as [Weight]
, COALESCE(A.[40 HC QTY], B.[40 HC QTY]) as [40 HC QTY]
, COALESCE(A.[Lead Time], B.[Lead Time]) as [Lead Time]
, COALESCE(A.[Gift Box Length], B.[Gift Box Length]) as [Gift Box Length]
, COALESCE(A.[Gift Box Width], B.[Gift Box Width]) as [Gift Box Width]
, COALESCE(A.[Gift Box Height], B.[Gift Box Height]) as [Gift Box Height]
, COALESCE(A.[Gift Box Weight], B.[Gift Box Weight]) as [Gift Box Weight]
, COALESCE(A.[Case Pack Qty], B.[Case Pack Qty]) as [Case Pack Qty]
, COALESCE(A.[Case Pack Length], B.[Case Pack Length]) as [Case Pack Length]
, COALESCE(A.[Case Pack Width], B.[Case Pack Width]) as [Case Pack Width]
, COALESCE(A.[Case Pack Height], B.[Case Pack Height]) as [Case Pack Height]
, COALESCE(A.[Case Pack Weight], B.[Case Pack Weight]) as [Case Pack Weight]
, COALESCE(A.[Master Pack Qty], B.[Master Pack Qty]) as [Master Pack Qty]
, COALESCE(A.[Master Pack Length], B.[Master Pack Length]) as [Master Pack Length]
, COALESCE(A.[Master Pack Width], B.[Master Pack Width]) as [Master Pack Width]
, COALESCE(A.[Master Pack Height], B.[Master Pack Height]) as [Master Pack Height]
, COALESCE(A.[Master Pack Weight], B.[Master Pack Weight]) as [Master Pack Weight]
, COALESCE(A.[Pallet Pack Qty], B.[Pallet Pack Qty]) as [Pallet Pack Qty]
, COALESCE(A.[Pallet Pack Length], B.[Pallet Pack Length]) as [Pallet Pack Length]
, COALESCE(A.[Pallet Pack Width], B.[Pallet Pack Width]) as [Pallet Pack Width]
, COALESCE(A.[Pallet Pack Height], B.[Pallet Pack Height]) as [Pallet Pack Height]
, COALESCE(A.[Pallet Pack Ti/Hi], B.[Pallet Pack Ti/Hi]) as [Pallet Pack Ti/Hi]
, COALESCE(A.[ASIN], B.[ASIN]) as [ASIN]
, COALESCE(A.[UPC], B.[UPC]) as [UPC]
, COALESCE(A.[EAN], B.[EAN]) as [EAN]
, COALESCE(A.[Supplier Code], B.[Supplier Code]) as [Supplier Code]
, COALESCE(A.[Supplier Name], B.[Supplier Name]) as [Supplier Name]
, COALESCE(A.[Image URL], B.[Image URL]) as [Image URL]
, COALESCE(A.[Customization Available], B.[Customization Available]) as [Customization Available]
, COALESCE(A.[Tier], B.[Tier]) as [Tier]
, COALESCE(A.[Canada Y/N], B.[Canada Y/N]) as [Canada Y/N]
, COALESCE(A.[Exclusivity], B.[Exclusivity]) as [Exclusivity]
, COALESCE(A.[Exclusivity 2], B.[Exclusivity 2]) as [Exclusivity 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Exclusivity 3], B.[Exclusivity 3]) as [Exclusivity 3]
, COALESCE(A.[Supplier Short Name], B.[Supplier Short Name]) as [Supplier Short Name]
, COALESCE(A.[Origin Port], B.[Origin Port]) as [Origin Port]
, COALESCE(A.[Estimated Landed Cost], B.[Estimated Landed Cost]) as [Estimated Landed Cost]
, COALESCE(A.[Origin Port to Warehouse Rate], B.[Origin Port to Warehouse Rate]) as [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate]
, COALESCE(A.[Duty Rate ($)], B.[Duty Rate ($)]) as [Duty Rate ($)]
, COALESCE(A.[Trump Tariff], B.[Trump Tariff]) as [Trump Tariff]
, COALESCE(A.[20' Container Qty], B.[20' Container Qty]) as [20' Container Qty]
, COALESCE(A.[40' Container Qty], B.[40' Container Qty]) as [40' Container Qty]
, COALESCE(A.[Country of Origin], B.[Country of Origin]) as [Country of Origin]
, COALESCE(A.[HTS Code], B.[HTS Code]) as [HTS Code]
, COALESCE(A.[Project Start Date], B.[Project Start Date]) as [Project Start Date]
, COALESCE(A.[Launch Date], B.[Launch Date]) as [Launch Date]
, COALESCE(A.[Updated Launch Date], B.[Updated Launch Date]) as [Updated Launch Date]
, COALESCE(A.[List Price], B.[List Price]) as [List Price]
, COALESCE(A.[Shipping Weight], B.[Shipping Weight]) as [Shipping Weight]
, COALESCE(A.[Shipping Length], B.[Shipping Length]) as [Shipping Length]
, COALESCE(A.[Shipping Width], B.[Shipping Width]) as [Shipping Width]
, COALESCE(A.[Shipping Height], B.[Shipping Height]) as [Shipping Height]
, COALESCE(A.[Shipping Quantity], B.[Shipping Quantity]) as [Shipping Quantity]
, COALESCE(A.[Primary Warehouse], B.[Primary Warehouse]) as [Primary Warehouse]
, COALESCE(A.[Secondary Warehouse 1], B.[Secondary Warehouse 1]) as [Secondary Warehouse 1]
, COALESCE(A.[Secondary Warehouse 2], B.[Secondary Warehouse 2]) as [Secondary Warehouse 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Country of Steel Smelt], B.[Country of Steel Smelt]) as [Country of Steel Smelt]
, COALESCE(A.[Weight of Steel (KG)], B.[Weight of Steel (KG)]) as [Weight of Steel (KG)]
, COALESCE(A.[Steel ($)], B.[Steel ($)]) as [Steel ($)]
, COALESCE(A.[Country of Aluminum Smelt], B.[Country of Aluminum Smelt]) as [Country of Aluminum Smelt]
, COALESCE(A.[Weight of Aluminum (KG)], B.[Weight of Aluminum (KG)]) as [Weight of Aluminum (KG)]
, COALESCE(A.[Aluminum ($)], B.[Aluminum ($)]) as [Aluminum ($)]
, COALESCE(A.[Country of Copper Smelt], B.[Country of Copper Smelt]) as [Country of Copper Smelt]
, COALESCE(A.[Weight of Copper (KG)], B.[Weight of Copper (KG)]) as [Weight of Copper (KG)]
, COALESCE(A.[Copper ($)], B.[Copper ($)]) as [Copper ($)]
, COALESCE(A.[Section 301 Exclusions], B.[Section 301 Exclusions]) as [Section 301 Exclusions]
, COALESCE(A.[SRP], B.[SRP]) as [SRP]
, COALESCE(A.[MAP Price], B.[MAP Price]) as [MAP Price]
, COALESCE(A.[State Restrictions 1], B.[State Restrictions 1]) as [State Restrictions 1]
, COALESCE(A.[State Restrictions 2], B.[State Restrictions 2]) as [State Restrictions 2]
, COALESCE(A.[State Restrictions 3], B.[State Restrictions 3]) as [State Restrictions 3]
, COALESCE(A.[State Restrictions 4], B.[State Restrictions 4]) as [State Restrictions 4]
, COALESCE(A.[State Restrictions 5], B.[State Restrictions 5]) as [State Restrictions 5]
, COALESCE(A.[AAFES], B.[AAFES]) as [AAFES]
, COALESCE(A.[Abt Electronics & Appliance], B.[Abt Electronics & Appliance]) as [Abt Electronics & Appliance]
, COALESCE(A.[Ace Hardware Corporation], B.[Ace Hardware Corporation]) as [Ace Hardware Corporation]
, COALESCE(A.[America'S Test Kitchen], B.[America'S Test Kitchen]) as [America'S Test Kitchen]
, COALESCE(A.[Cabela's / Bass Pro Shops], B.[Cabela's / Bass Pro Shops]) as [Cabela's / Bass Pro Shops]
, COALESCE(A.[Bed Bath & Beyond], B.[Bed Bath & Beyond]) as [Bed Bath & Beyond]
, COALESCE(A.[Bencoff Ventures, Llc Dba Mavro & Associates], B.[Bencoff Ventures, Llc Dba Mavro & Associates]) as [Bencoff Ventures, Llc Dba Mavro & Associates]
, COALESCE(A.[Best Buy CA], B.[Best Buy CA]) as [Best Buy CA]
, COALESCE(A.[Best Buy US], B.[Best Buy US]) as [Best Buy US]
, COALESCE(A.[Bimart], B.[Bimart]) as [Bimart]
, COALESCE(A.[Bj'S Wholesale Club], B.[Bj'S Wholesale Club]) as [Bj'S Wholesale Club]
, COALESCE(A.[Blain's], B.[Blain's]) as [Blain's]
, COALESCE(A.[Bluestem Brands Inc], B.[Bluestem Brands Inc]) as [Bluestem Brands Inc]
, COALESCE(A.[Camping World], B.[Camping World]) as [Camping World]
, COALESCE(A.[Canadian Tire], B.[Canadian Tire]) as [Canadian Tire]
, COALESCE(A.[Costco CA], B.[Costco CA]) as [Costco CA]
, COALESCE(A.[Costco US], B.[Costco US]) as [Costco US]
, COALESCE(A.[Crate & Barrel], B.[Crate & Barrel]) as [Crate & Barrel]
, COALESCE(A.[Cutlery And More], B.[Cutlery And More]) as [Cutlery And More]
, COALESCE(A.[Do It Best Corp], B.[Do It Best Corp]) as [Do It Best Corp]
, COALESCE(A.[Electronic Express], B.[Electronic Express]) as [Electronic Express]
, COALESCE(A.[Mills Fleet Farm], B.[Mills Fleet Farm]) as [Mills Fleet Farm]
, COALESCE(A.[Focus Camera, Llc], B.[Focus Camera, Llc]) as [Focus Camera, Llc]
, COALESCE(A.[Food 52], B.[Food 52]) as [Food 52]
, COALESCE(A.[Guest Supply Inc.], B.[Guest Supply Inc.]) as [Guest Supply Inc.]
, COALESCE(A.[H2O Labs Inc.], B.[H2O Labs Inc.]) as [H2O Labs Inc.]
, COALESCE(A.[Harris Teeter Inc.], B.[Harris Teeter Inc.]) as [Harris Teeter Inc.]
, COALESCE(A.[Hd Supply], B.[Hd Supply]) as [Hd Supply]
, COALESCE(A.[Home Hardware Stores Ltd], B.[Home Hardware Stores Ltd]) as [Home Hardware Stores Ltd]
, COALESCE(A.[HSN], B.[HSN]) as [HSN]
, COALESCE(A.[Hy-Vee Inc], B.[Hy-Vee Inc]) as [Hy-Vee Inc]
, COALESCE(A.[Incentive Concepts, Llc], B.[Incentive Concepts, Llc]) as [Incentive Concepts, Llc]
, COALESCE(A.[Jack L Marcus Inc], B.[Jack L Marcus Inc]) as [Jack L Marcus Inc]
, COALESCE(A.[JC Penney], B.[JC Penney]) as [JC Penney]
, COALESCE(A.[Restaurant Depot /Jetro], B.[Restaurant Depot /Jetro]) as [Restaurant Depot /Jetro]
, COALESCE(A.[Kohls], B.[Kohls]) as [Kohls]
, COALESCE(A.[Fred Meyer/Kroger], B.[Fred Meyer/Kroger]) as [Fred Meyer/Kroger]
, COALESCE(A.[Leatherman], B.[Leatherman]) as [Leatherman]
, COALESCE(A.[Lee Valley Tools CA], B.[Lee Valley Tools CA]) as [Lee Valley Tools CA]
, COALESCE(A.[Life At Home Us Corp], B.[Life At Home Us Corp]) as [Life At Home Us Corp]
, COALESCE(A.[London Drugs Limited (Bc)], B.[London Drugs Limited (Bc)]) as [London Drugs Limited (Bc)]
, COALESCE(A.[Lowes US], B.[Lowes US]) as [Lowes US]
, COALESCE(A.[Lowes CA], B.[Lowes CA]) as [Lowes CA]
, COALESCE(A.[Macy's], B.[Macy's]) as [Macy's]
, COALESCE(A.[Mason Companies, Inc], B.[Mason Companies, Inc]) as [Mason Companies, Inc]
, COALESCE(A.[Mcx - US Marines Corp], B.[Mcx - US Marines Corp]) as [Mcx - US Marines Corp]
, COALESCE(A.[Meijer, Inc.], B.[Meijer, Inc.]) as [Meijer, Inc.]
, COALESCE(A.[Menards, Inc.], B.[Menards, Inc.]) as [Menards, Inc.]
, COALESCE(A.[Mercer Tool Corporation], B.[Mercer Tool Corporation]) as [Mercer Tool Corporation]
, COALESCE(A.[Myregistry Llc], B.[Myregistry Llc]) as [Myregistry Llc]
, COALESCE(A.[Nexcom], B.[Nexcom]) as [Nexcom]
, COALESCE(A.[Nebraska Furniture Mart], B.[Nebraska Furniture Mart]) as [Nebraska Furniture Mart]
, COALESCE(A.[Nordstrom], B.[Nordstrom]) as [Nordstrom]
, COALESCE(A.[Office Depot], B.[Office Depot]) as [Office Depot]
, COALESCE(A.[Optics Planet, Inc], B.[Optics Planet, Inc]) as [Optics Planet, Inc]
, COALESCE(A.[Overstock], B.[Overstock]) as [Overstock]
, COALESCE(A.[Pottery Barn], B.[Pottery Barn]) as [Pottery Barn]
, COALESCE(A.[QVC], B.[QVC]) as [QVC]
, COALESCE(A.[Rue La La], B.[Rue La La]) as [Rue La La]
, COALESCE(A.[Sam'S Club], B.[Sam'S Club]) as [Sam'S Club]
, COALESCE(A.[Silverstar], B.[Silverstar]) as [Silverstar]
, COALESCE(A.[Smart & Final], B.[Smart & Final]) as [Smart & Final]
, COALESCE(A.[Snappy App., Inc.], B.[Snappy App., Inc.]) as [Snappy App., Inc.]
, COALESCE(A.[Staples US], B.[Staples US]) as [Staples US]
, COALESCE(A.[Sur La Table], B.[Sur La Table]) as [Sur La Table]
, COALESCE(A.[Target], B.[Target]) as [Target]
, COALESCE(A.[Texas Dept Of Crml Justice], B.[Texas Dept Of Crml Justice]) as [Texas Dept Of Crml Justice]
, COALESCE(A.[Home Depot US], B.[Home Depot US]) as [Home Depot US]
, COALESCE(A.[Home Depot CA], B.[Home Depot CA]) as [Home Depot CA]
, COALESCE(A.[The Joneses Ny Llc], B.[The Joneses Ny Llc]) as [The Joneses Ny Llc]
, COALESCE(A.[Total Wine], B.[Total Wine]) as [Total Wine]
, COALESCE(A.[Tractor Supply], B.[Tractor Supply]) as [Tractor Supply]
, COALESCE(A.[True Brands], B.[True Brands]) as [True Brands]
, COALESCE(A.[Union Supply Company Inc], B.[Union Supply Company Inc]) as [Union Supply Company Inc]
, COALESCE(A.[Veterans Canteen Service], B.[Veterans Canteen Service]) as [Veterans Canteen Service]
, COALESCE(A.[Walkenhorsts], B.[Walkenhorsts]) as [Walkenhorsts]
, COALESCE(A.[Walmart CA], B.[Walmart CA]) as [Walmart CA]
, COALESCE(A.[Walmart US], B.[Walmart US]) as [Walmart US]
, COALESCE(A.[Wayfair CA], B.[Wayfair CA]) as [Wayfair CA]
, COALESCE(A.[Wayfair US], B.[Wayfair US]) as [Wayfair US]
, COALESCE(A.[Wegmans], B.[Wegmans]) as [Wegmans]
, COALESCE(A.[Williams-Sonoma], B.[Williams-Sonoma]) as [Williams-Sonoma]
, COALESCE(A.[World Market], B.[World Market]) as [World Market]
, COALESCE(A.[Zoro Tools, Inc., Dba Zoro], B.[Zoro Tools, Inc., Dba Zoro]) as [Zoro Tools, Inc., Dba Zoro]
, COALESCE(A.[Alternative SKU 1], B.[Alternative SKU 1]) as [Alternative SKU 1]
, COALESCE(A.[Alternative SKU 2], B.[Alternative SKU 2]) as [Alternative SKU 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Alternative SKU 3], B.[Alternative SKU 3]) as [Alternative SKU 3]
, COALESCE(A.[Alternative SKU 4], B.[Alternative SKU 4]) as [Alternative SKU 4]
, COALESCE(A.[Packaging Type], B.[Packaging Type]) as [Packaging Type]
, COALESCE(A.[Ship Type], B.[Ship Type]) as [Ship Type]
, COALESCE(A.[Supplier Code 2], B.[Supplier Code 2]) as [Supplier Code 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Supplier Name 2], B.[Supplier Name 2]) as [Supplier Name 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Supplier Short Name 2], B.[Supplier Short Name 2]) as [Supplier Short Name 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Origin Port 2], B.[Origin Port 2]) as [Origin Port 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Country of Origin 2], B.[Country of Origin 2]) as [Country of Origin 2]
, COALESCE(A.[FOB Cost 2], B.[FOB Cost 2]) as [FOB Cost 2]
, COALESCE(A.[Stages], B.[Stages]) as [Stages]
, COALESCE(A.[Online Customers], B.[Online Customers]) as [Online Customers]
, COALESCE(A.[In-Store Customers], B.[In-Store Customers]) as [In-Store Customers]
, COALESCE(A.[Drop-In Customers], B.[Drop-In Customers]) as [Drop-In Customers]
, COALESCE(A.[Drop Ship Price], B.[Drop Ship Price]) as [Drop Ship Price]

, COALESCE(A.[Exclusivity 4], B.[Exclusivity 4]) as [Exclusivity 4]
, COALESCE(A.[Exclusivity 5], B.[Exclusivity 5]) as [Exclusivity 5]
, COALESCE(A.[Exclusivity 6], B.[Exclusivity 6]) as [Exclusivity 6]
, COALESCE(A.[Exclusivity 7], B.[Exclusivity 7]) as [Exclusivity 7]
, COALESCE(A.[Product Title], B.[Product Title]) as [Product Title]

, COALESCE(A.[Marketing Launch Playbook], B.[Marketing Launch Playbook]) as [Marketing Launch Playbook]
, COALESCE(A.[Item Weight (KG)], B.[Item Weight (KG)]) as [Item Weight (KG)]

, A.[M3 Sales Price] as [M3 Sales Price]
, A.[Extended Item Number]

, COALESCE(A.[Calculated 40' HC QTY], B.[Calculated 40' HC QTY]) as [Calculated 40' HC QTY]
, COALESCE(A.[Model], B.[Model]) as [Model]

, COALESCE(A.[Compatible Finished Good(s)], B.[Compatible Finished Good(s)]) as [Compatible Finished Good(s)]
, COALESCE(A.[Compatible Service Parts & Components], B.[Compatible Service Parts & Components]) as [Compatible Service Parts & Components]
, COALESCE(A.[Minimum Stock], B.[Minimum Stock]) as [Minimum Stock]
, COALESCE(A.[Maximum Stock], B.[Maximum Stock]) as [Maximum Stock]

, A.[Forecast Whse] as [Forecast Whse]

FROM
(
SELECT          DISTINCT ITNO AS    [Item Number]
FROM            M3.MITMAS

UNION

SELECT          DISTINCT [Salsify Item Number] AS     [Item Number]
FROM            SLS.Products_BI
WHERE           [Salsify Item Number] NOT LIKE 'XNDP%'
) FW

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT DISTINCT MM.[ITNO] AS    [Item Number], [Salsify Item Number]
,                               [Description], [Transition From], [Transition To], [Aligned Item Number]
,                               [Status], [Procurement Type] as [Manufactured or Purchased], [Item Type], [Business Unit], [Division]
,                               [Finance Brand], [Brand], [Sub Brand] as [Sub-Brand], [Brand Control], [Collection], [Product Line], [Category], [Sub Category] as [Subcategory]
,                               [Base Model Item Number] as [Base Model SKU], [FOB Cost], MF.APPR as [M3 Cost], MM.[RIDE] as [WIP Number], [Origin Port Freight Cost] as [Freight Cost], NULL as [Landed Cost], [Wholesale Price] 				    	      
,                               [US Duty Rate %] as [US Duty Rate], [Canada Duty Rate %] as [CA Duty Rate], [Item Weight] as [Weight], [40' HC Qty] as [40 HC QTY], [Sourcing Lead Time] as [Lead Time] , [Gift Box Length]
,                               [Gift Box Width], [Gift Box Height], [Gift Box Weight], [Case Pack Quantity] as [Case Pack Qty], [Case Pack Length]
,                               [Case Pack Width], [Case Pack Height], [Case Pack Weight], [Master Pack Quantity] as [Master Pack Qty]
,                               [Master Pack Length], [Master Pack Width], [Master Pack Height], [Master Pack Weight]
,                               [Pallet Quantity] as [Pallet Pack Qty], [Pallet Length] as [Pallet Pack Length], [Pallet Width] as [Pallet Pack Width], [Pallet Height] as [Pallet Pack Height]
,                               [Pallet Ti/Hi] as [Pallet Pack Ti/Hi], [Amazon ASIN] as [ASIN], [UPC], [EAN], [Supplier Code], [Supplier Name]
,                               [Main Image] as [Image URL], [Customization Available], [Item Priority] as [Tier], [Complies with Canadian Laws] as [Canada Y/N]
,                               [Exclusivity], [Exclusivity 2], [Exclusivity 3]
,                               [Supplier Short Name], [Origin Port], [Estimated Landed Cost], [Origin Port Freight Cost] as [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate]
,                               [Duty Cost] as [Duty Rate ($)], [Trump Tariff %] as [Trump Tariff], [20' GP Qty] as [20' Container Qty], [40' GP Qty] as [40' Container Qty], [Country of Origin], [HTS Code]
,                               [Project Start Date], [Launch Date], [Updated Launch Date], [List Price]
,                               [Shipping Weight], [Shipping Length], [Shipping Width], [Shipping Height], [Shipping Quantity], [Primary Warehouse], [Secondary Warehouse 1], [Secondary Warehouse 2]
,                               [Country of Steel Smelt], [Weight of Steel (KG)], [Steel ($)], [Country of Aluminum Smelt], [Weight of Aluminum (KG)], [Aluminum ($)], [Country of Copper Smelt], [Weight of Copper (KG)], [Copper ($)], [Section 301 Exclusions]
,                               [SRP], [MAP Price], [State Restrictions 1], [State Restrictions 2], [State Restrictions 3], [State Restrictions 4], [State Restrictions 5]
,                               [AAFES],[Abt Electronics & Appliance],[Ace Hardware Corporation],[America'S Test Kitchen],[Cabela's / Bass Pro Shops],[Bed Bath & Beyond],[Bencoff Ventures, Llc Dba Mavro & Associates]
,                               [Best Buy CA],[Best Buy US],[Bimart],[Bj'S Wholesale Club],[Blain's],[Bluestem Brands Inc],[Camping World],[Canadian Tire],[Costco CA],[Costco US],[Crate & Barrel]
,                               [Cutlery And More],[Do It Best Corp],[Electronic Express],[Mills Fleet Farm],[Focus Camera, Llc],[Food 52],[Guest Supply Inc.],[H2O Labs Inc.],[Harris Teeter Inc.]
,                               [Hd Supply],[Home Hardware Stores Ltd],[HSN],[Hy-Vee Inc],[Incentive Concepts, Llc],[Jack L Marcus Inc],[JC Penney],[Restaurant Depot /Jetro],[Kohls]
,                               [Fred Meyer/Kroger],[Leatherman],[Lee Valley Tools CA],[Life At Home Us Corp],[London Drugs Limited (Bc)],[Lowes US],[Lowes CA],[Macy's],[Mason Companies, Inc]
,                               [Mcx - US Marines Corp],[Meijer, Inc.],[Menards, Inc.],[Mercer Tool Corporation],[Myregistry Llc],[Nexcom],[Nebraska Furniture Mart],[Nordstrom],[Office Depot]
,                               [Optics Planet, Inc],[Overstock],[Pottery Barn],[QVC],[Rue La La],[Sam'S Club],[Silverstar],[Smart & Final],[Snappy App., Inc.],[Staples US],[Sur La Table]
,                               [Target],[Texas Dept Of Crml Justice],[Home Depot US],[Home Depot CA],[The Joneses Ny Llc],[Total Wine],[Tractor Supply],[True Brands],[Union Supply Company Inc]
,                               [Veterans Canteen Service],[Walkenhorsts],[Walmart CA],[Walmart US],[Wayfair CA],[Wayfair US],[Wegmans],[Williams-Sonoma],[World Market],[Zoro Tools, Inc., Dba Zoro]
,                               [Alternative SKU 1], [Alternative SKU 2], [Alternative SKU 3], [Alternative SKU 4]
,                               [Packaging Type], [Ship Type]
,                               [Supplier Code 2], [Supplier Name 2], [Supplier Short Name 2], [Origin Port 2], [Country of Origin 2], [FOB Cost 2], [Stages]
,                               [Online Customers], [In-Store Customers], [Drop-In Customers], [Drop Ship Price]
,                               [Exclusivity 4], [Exclusivity 5], [Exclusivity 6], [Exclusivity 7], [Product Title]
,                               [Marketing Launch Playbook], [Item Weight (KG)]
,                               MM.SAPR as [M3 Sales Price], MM.ITNE as [Extended Item Number]
,                               [Calculated 40' HC QTY], [Model]
,                               [Compatible Finished Good(s)], [Compatible Service Parts & Components], [Minimum Stock], [Maximum Stock]
,                               MM.CFI3 as [Forecast Whse]

FROM            M3.MITMAS MM
LEFT JOIN       SLS.Products_BI SLS on MM.ITNO = SLS.[M3 Item Number]
LEFT JOIN       M3.MITFAC MF on MM.ITNO = MF.ITNO and MF.FACI = 'TLC'
) A on FW.[Item Number] = A.[Item Number]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT DISTINCT [Salsify Item Number] AS       [Item Number], [Salsify Item Number]
,                               [Description], [Transition From], [Transition To], [Aligned Item Number]
,                               [Status], [Procurement Type] as [Manufactured or Purchased], [Item Type], [Business Unit], [Division]
,                               [Finance Brand], [Brand], [Sub Brand] as [Sub-Brand], [Brand Control], [Collection], [Product Line], [Category], [Sub Category] as [Subcategory]
,                               [Base Model Item Number] as [Base Model SKU], [FOB Cost], NULL as [M3 Cost], NULL as [WIP Number], [Origin Port Freight Cost] as [Freight Cost], NULL as [Landed Cost], [Wholesale Price] 				    	      
,                               [US Duty Rate %] as [US Duty Rate], [Canada Duty Rate %] as [CA Duty Rate], [Item Weight] as [Weight], [40' HC Qty] as [40 HC QTY], [Sourcing Lead Time] as [Lead Time] , [Gift Box Length]
,                               [Gift Box Width], [Gift Box Height], [Gift Box Weight], [Case Pack Quantity] as [Case Pack Qty], [Case Pack Length]
,                               [Case Pack Width], [Case Pack Height], [Case Pack Weight], [Master Pack Quantity] as [Master Pack Qty]
,                               [Master Pack Length], [Master Pack Width], [Master Pack Height], [Master Pack Weight]
,                               [Pallet Quantity] as [Pallet Pack Qty], [Pallet Length] as [Pallet Pack Length], [Pallet Width] as [Pallet Pack Width], [Pallet Height] as [Pallet Pack Height]
,                               [Pallet Ti/Hi] as [Pallet Pack Ti/Hi], [Amazon ASIN] as [ASIN], [UPC], [EAN], [Supplier Code], [Supplier Name]
,                               [Main Image] as [Image URL], [Customization Available], [Item Priority] as [Tier], [Complies with Canadian Laws] as [Canada Y/N]
,                               [Exclusivity], [Exclusivity 2], [Exclusivity 3]
,                               [Supplier Short Name], [Origin Port], [Estimated Landed Cost], [Origin Port Freight Cost] as [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate]
,                               [Duty Cost] as [Duty Rate ($)], [Trump Tariff %] as [Trump Tariff], [20' GP Qty] as [20' Container Qty], [40' GP Qty] as [40' Container Qty], [Country of Origin], [HTS Code]
,                               [Project Start Date], [Launch Date], [Updated Launch Date], [List Price]
,                               [Shipping Weight], [Shipping Length], [Shipping Width], [Shipping Height], [Shipping Quantity], [Primary Warehouse], [Secondary Warehouse 1], [Secondary Warehouse 2]
,                               [Country of Steel Smelt], [Weight of Steel (KG)], [Steel ($)], [Country of Aluminum Smelt], [Weight of Aluminum (KG)], [Aluminum ($)], [Country of Copper Smelt], [Weight of Copper (KG)], [Copper ($)], [Section 301 Exclusions]
,                               [SRP], [MAP Price], [State Restrictions 1], [State Restrictions 2], [State Restrictions 3], [State Restrictions 4], [State Restrictions 5]
,                               [AAFES],[Abt Electronics & Appliance],[Ace Hardware Corporation],[America'S Test Kitchen],[Cabela's / Bass Pro Shops],[Bed Bath & Beyond],[Bencoff Ventures, Llc Dba Mavro & Associates]
,                               [Best Buy CA],[Best Buy US],[Bimart],[Bj'S Wholesale Club],[Blain's],[Bluestem Brands Inc],[Camping World],[Canadian Tire],[Costco CA],[Costco US],[Crate & Barrel]
,                               [Cutlery And More],[Do It Best Corp],[Electronic Express],[Mills Fleet Farm],[Focus Camera, Llc],[Food 52],[Guest Supply Inc.],[H2O Labs Inc.],[Harris Teeter Inc.]
,                               [Hd Supply],[Home Hardware Stores Ltd],[HSN],[Hy-Vee Inc],[Incentive Concepts, Llc],[Jack L Marcus Inc],[JC Penney],[Restaurant Depot /Jetro],[Kohls]
,                               [Fred Meyer/Kroger],[Leatherman],[Lee Valley Tools CA],[Life At Home Us Corp],[London Drugs Limited (Bc)],[Lowes US],[Lowes CA],[Macy's],[Mason Companies, Inc]
,                               [Mcx - US Marines Corp],[Meijer, Inc.],[Menards, Inc.],[Mercer Tool Corporation],[Myregistry Llc],[Nexcom],[Nebraska Furniture Mart],[Nordstrom],[Office Depot]
,                               [Optics Planet, Inc],[Overstock],[Pottery Barn],[QVC],[Rue La La],[Sam'S Club],[Silverstar],[Smart & Final],[Snappy App., Inc.],[Staples US],[Sur La Table]
,                               [Target],[Texas Dept Of Crml Justice],[Home Depot US],[Home Depot CA],[The Joneses Ny Llc],[Total Wine],[Tractor Supply],[True Brands],[Union Supply Company Inc]
,                               [Veterans Canteen Service],[Walkenhorsts],[Walmart CA],[Walmart US],[Wayfair CA],[Wayfair US],[Wegmans],[Williams-Sonoma],[World Market],[Zoro Tools, Inc., Dba Zoro]
,                               [Alternative SKU 1], [Alternative SKU 2], [Alternative SKU 3], [Alternative SKU 4]
,                               [Packaging Type], [Ship Type]
,                               [Supplier Code 2], [Supplier Name 2], [Supplier Short Name 2], [Origin Port 2], [Country of Origin 2], [FOB Cost 2], [Stages]
,                               [Online Customers], [In-Store Customers], [Drop-In Customers], [Drop Ship Price]
,                               [Exclusivity 4], [Exclusivity 5], [Exclusivity 6], [Exclusivity 7], [Product Title]
,                               [Marketing Launch Playbook], [Item Weight (KG)]
,                               NULL as [M3 Sales Price], NULL as [Extended Item Number]
,                               [Calculated 40' HC QTY], [Model]
,                               [Compatible Finished Good(s)], [Compatible Service Parts & Components], [Minimum Stock], [Maximum Stock]
,                               NULL as [Forecast Whse]

FROM            SLS.Products_BI
WHERE           [Salsify Item Number] NOT LIKE 'XNDP%'
) B on FW.[Item Number] = B.[Item Number]
/*
LEFT JOIN

,                               [Description], NULL as [Transition From], NULL as  [Transition To], [Aligned Item Number]
,                               [Status], [Manufactured or Purchased] as [Manufactured or Purchased], [Item Type], [Business Unit], [Division]
,                               [Finance Brand], [Brand], [Sub-Brand], NULL as [Brand Control], NULL as [Collection], [Product Line], [Category], [Subcategory]
,                               [Base Model SKU], NULL as [FOB Cost], NULL as [M3 Cost], NULL as [Freight Cost], NULL as [Landed Cost], NULL as [Wholesale Price] 				    	      
,                               NULL as [US Duty Rate], NULL as [CA Duty Rate], NULL as [Weight], NULL as [40 HC QTY], NULL as [Lead Time] , NULL as [Gift Box Length]
,                               NULL as [Gift Box Width], NULL as [Gift Box Height], NULL as [Gift Box Weight], NULL as [Case Pack Qty], NULL as [Case Pack Length]
,                               NULL as [Case Pack Width], NULL as [Case Pack Height], NULL as [Case Pack Weight], NULL as [Master Pack Qty]
,                               NULL as [Master Pack Length], NULL as [Master Pack Width], NULL as [Master Pack Height], NULL as [Master Pack Weight]
,                               NULL as [Pallet Pack Qty], NULL as [Pallet Pack Length], NULL as [Pallet Pack Width], NULL as [Pallet Pack Height]
,                               NULL as [Pallet Pack Ti/Hi], NULL as [ASIN], NULL as [UPC], NULL as [EAN], NULL as [Supplier Code], NULL as [Supplier Name]
,                               NULL as [Image URL], NULL as [Customization Available], NULL as [Tier], NULL as [Canada Y/N], NULL as [Exclusivity], NULL as [Exclusivity 2], NULL as [Exclusivity 3]
,                               NULL as [Supplier Short Name], NULL as [Origin Port], NULL as [Estimated Landed Cost], NULL as [Origin Port to Warehouse Rate]
,                               NULL as [Duty Rate ($)], NULL as [Trump Tariff], NULL as [20' Container Qty], NULL as [40' Container Qty], NULL as [Country of Origin], NULL as [HTS Code]
,                               NULL as [Project Start Date], NULL as [Launch Date], NULL as [Updated Launch Date]
FROM            v_Discontinued
) C on FW.[Item Number] = C.[Item Number]
*/
) X

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          [Salsify Item Number], Description
FROM            SLS.Products_BI
) Y on X.[Aligned Item Number] = Y.[Salsify Item Number]

where X.[Description] is not null
